verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'll never be more loved than I am right now Wasn't holding You up So there's nothing I can do to let You down It doesn't take a trophy to make You proud I'll never be more loved than I am right now, oh

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Going through a storm but I won't go down I hear Your voice Carried in the rhythm of the wind to call me out You would cross an ocean so I wouldn't drown You've never been closer than You are right now (Let's sing it loud y'all)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are Jireh, You are enough Jireh, You are enough And I will be content in every circumstance You are Jireh, You are enough

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Forever enough Always enough More than enough Forever enough Always enough More than enough

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I don't wanna forget how I feel right now On the mountaintop I can see so clear what it's all about So stay by my side when the sun goes down Don't wanna forget how I feel right now (Jireh)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Jireh, You are enough Jireh, You are enough (so I will be) I will be content in every circumstance Jireh, You are enough (He is always enough)

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: He's forever enough Always enough Always more than enough He is, He is Forever enough Always enough (He's everything, He's always) More than enough (yeah)

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I'm already loved I'm already chosen I know who I am I know what You've spoken I'm already loved More than I could imagine And that is enough, oh-oh

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I'm already loved (I'm already loved) I'm already chosen (I'm already chosen) I know who I am (I know who I am) I know what You've spoken (I know what You've spoken) I'm already loved (I'm already loved) More than I could imagine (more than I could imagine) That is enough (that is enough) It's enough for me, oh

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: I'm already loved (I'm already loved) I'm already chosen (I'm already chosen) I know who I am (I know who I am) I know, I know what You've spoken (I know what You've spoken) I'm already loved (I'm already loved) More than I could even fathom (more than I could imagine) And that is enough (and that is enough) Yes it is, it's enough, it's enough

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: And that is enough (that is enough) What His truth says is better than anything That is enough (that is enough) What He's declared over us, it's true That is enough (that is enough) That is enough (that is enough)

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: That is enough (that is enough) Jehovah, You are (that is enough) El Shaddai, You are (that is enough) When I have You, I have everything (that is enough) When I have Jesus, I have everything (that is enough) That is enough (that is enough)

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: 'Cause You are enough (You are enough) You're my portion (You are enough) You're my portion (You are enough) More than enough for me (You are enough) Say, You are enough (You are enough) So I am enough (so I am enough) You are enough (You are enough) So I am enough (so I am enough) Say, Jireh

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Jireh, You are enough (Jireh) Jireh, You are enough (yes Your are) I will be content in every circumstance Jireh, You are enough, oh-ooh (You are)

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: If He dresses the lilies with beauty and splendor How much more will He clothe you? How much more will He clothe you? If He watched over every sparrow How much more does He love you? How much more does He love you?

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: If He dresses the lilies with beauty and splendor How much more will He clothe you? How much more will He clothe you? If He watched over every sparrow (don't you worry!) How much more does He love you? (Our Father loves you) How much more does He love you? (How much more?)

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: How much more does He love you? (How much more?) How much more does He love you? (How much more?) How much more does He love you? (How much more?) How much more does He love you? (How much more?) How much more does He love you?

verse.name: v18
verse.lines: It's more than you ask, think or imagine According to His power working in us It's more than enough It's more than you ask, think or imagine, oh yeah According to His power working in us It's more than enough (let's go y'all)

verse.name: v19
verse.lines: It's more than you ask, think or imagine (so according) According to His power, it's working in us (how much more does He love you?) It's more than enough (how much more? Sing!) More than you ask, think or imagine (so according) According to His power working in us (how much more does He love you?) It's more than enough (one more time, sing!)

verse.name: v20
verse.lines: More than you ask, think or imagine According to His power working in us (how much more does He love you?) It's more than enough (how much more?) It's more than enough (how much more?) More than you know (more than enough) It's more than enough (more than you know) More than you know (more)

verse.name: v21
verse.lines: Jireh, You are enough Jireh, You are enough (You've always been enough) And I will be content in every circumstance Jireh, You are enough

verse.name: v22
verse.lines: And I will be content (yes) in every circumstance Jireh, You are enough
